import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at_or(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut done = false
      while i < n and not done
        let c = byte_at_or(s, i)
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, sign * val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let na = list.len(a)
  while i < na
    match list.get(a, i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut running = true
  while running
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
      mut i = 0
      let n = list.len(remaining)
      mut removed = false
      while i < n
        match list.get(remaining, i)
        when Some(x)
          if x == m and not removed
            removed = true
          else
            new_rem = list.push(new_rem, x)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      remaining = new_rem
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if list.len(sorted) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(sorted)
  while i < n
    match list.get(sorted, i)
    when Some(x)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{x}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
